message:
test: add grouped-SUM correctness helpers, B3 autocommit profile breakdown, and direct-insert hot-path instrumentation

fast_path_separation.rs:
- Add stringify_fsqlite_value() and stringify_rusqlite_value() for
  cross-engine row comparison (converts each SqliteValue variant to a
  deterministic string representation including typed NULL, quoted Text,
  and hex-encoded Blob)
- Add sorted_frank_rows() and sorted_rusqlite_rows() that execute a
  query against each engine and return rows sorted for diff-friendly
  comparison
- Add seed_grouped_sum_bench() to populate both frankensqlite and
  rusqlite connections with the same (id, name, value) test data for
  GROUP BY correctness proofs

prepared_hit_rate_proof.rs:
- Import reorder (alphabetical, rustfmt)
- Add test_b3_small_3col_autocommit_direct_insert_profile_breakdown():
  512-row autocommit INSERT workload that captures fine-grained profile
  counters for each phase of the direct-insert fast path (row_build,
  cursor_setup, serialize, btree_insert, memdb_apply) plus the
  autocommit wrapper overhead (schema_validation, autocommit_begin,
  change_tracking, autocommit_resolve)

bd_1lsfu_1_operation_baselines.rs:
- Extend log_manual_insert_hot_path_profile() format string with 11 new
  fields covering direct-insert phase breakdown and autocommit wrapper
  breakdown (row_build_us through direct_autocommit_execs)
- Add manual_hot_path_profile_small_prepared_insert_autocommit_10k():
  10K-row small_3col autocommit benchmark for validating per-row
  micro-cuts in the prepared INSERT path

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
